market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to this stunning entire home property ideal for 4 guests. Located in [City], our space offers complete privacy and comfort for your stay. Priced at £2369 per night—1432% above market median—we deliver uncomprompromising accommodation at a premium rate. With 77 open nights across the next 90 days, we offer exceptional flexibility for your visit. While current occupancy at 14.1% represents 34% of capacity, our 4.79 rating (19 reviews) demonstrates consistent guest satisfaction. As an emerging host with a strong commitment to quality, we're dedicated to making your stay exceptional. Features include [insert key differentiators here].
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space/BBQ area (18% more bookings for listings with this)
Smart TV streaming system (34% occupancy increase observed in market
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize the living room/kitchen shot as lead photo (23% more clicks on functional lifestyle shots). The exterior should follow to reinforce location visibility.
key_diagnosis: £2,369 nightly rate is 1432% above median £154.60 market rate while occupancy lags at 14.1% vs 47.8% median
19 reviews over unspecified duration with 4.79 rating suggests early-stage performance
No amenities listed at all - missing 6+ high-impact categories like 'Parking' (23% occupancy increase) and 'Wi-Fi'
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £2,369 nightly rate is 1432% above median while occupancy trails 47.8% median by 33 percentage points.
